experimental.title: Rotation-flip detector (Improving/Leading -> Weakening/Peaking) as a state-transition timing layer
experimental.note: Method: flag any sector crossing out of a strong quad (Leading->Peaking / Improving->Weakening) with negative acceleration on a fresh market-bar date, then event-study forward 5/10-day sector return conditioned on whether the next scheduled catalyst confirms or denies the roll. THIS RUN the detector flags an XLV->XLE hand-off on the fresh 2026-07-20 sector bar: XLV Weakening (quad W, accel -2.21, rsMom6m -5.08, rsMom 99.26) rolling out while XLE Leading (quad L, accel +2.52, rsMom 103.01, rsMom6m +15.64) rotates in, with leader XLK only Basing (quad A, accel +0.25, rsMom1m -5.64) and no clean Leading GICS sector - a DEFENSIVE(healthcare)->CYCLICAL(energy) hand-off (a risk-on roll), but XLE's MA stack is still tangled (+13.31% >200d), so it is actionable as a tilt yet flagged for persistence per anti-whipsaw. The value is the state-transition TIMING, which no owning tool persists today. Persistence is counted across DISTINCT market-bar dates (a persisted prior-bar snapshot vs this 2026-07-20 bar), never repeated intraday runs.

inputs: sector-research-lab per-sector rsRatio / rsMom / accel / quad, counted across distinct market-bar dates (persisted prior-bar snapshot vs the 2026-07-20 bar)

experimental.title: Cross-tool haven-abstinence x sector-rotation risk-on gate (FIRES this run - defensive-out leg satisfied)
experimental.note: Method: on each fresh market-bar date, cross the real-assets monetary-haven leg against the sector-RRG rotation vector - declare a 'clean risk-on' state only when (a) the monetary metals are in downtrends AND (b) a defensive sector is rotating out while a cyclical rotates in with no clean Leading defensive; then event-study forward bench drift conditioned on the joint state vs either half alone. THIS RUN the state fires on the honest read: the metal-haven leg is satisfied - GLD 11.2 and SLV 0 both Downtrend (mom63 -17.47 / -30.08), IBIT 23.3 Downtrend, BTC-USD 42.7 Mixed but medium-term soft (mom63 -16.36) so there is no haven bid - AND the sector roll is defensive-to-cyclical (XLV healthcare rotating OUT, rrgState Weakening, accel -2.21 -> XLE energy rotating IN, rrgState Leading, accel +2.52) with no clean Leading defensive, so leg (b) is met. Distinguishes a broad defensive-to-cyclical risk-on turn (this run) from an intra-cyclical reshuffle where leg (b) would be unmet. Needs a persisted prior-bar snapshot to compute the state-transition delta across distinct market-bar dates.
experimental.method: Joint-state gate: on each fresh market-bar date, AND the real-assets monetary-haven leg (metals in downtrends) with the sector-RRG defensive-out/cyclical-in vector (no clean Leading defensive) to declare a 'clean risk-on' state, then event-study forward bench drift for the joint state versus either half alone. State-transition delta is measured across distinct market-bar dates.
inputs: real-assets-lab GLD / SLV / IBIT / BTC-USD trend + mom63 (haven-abstinence leg)
sector-research-lab per-name rrgState / rotation / accel with a GICS defensive/cyclical tag
a persisted prior-bar snapshot to compute the state-transition delta across distinct market-bar dates
